Mammoth Balloon Dilatation Catheter

Mammoth · Balloon Catheters

Balloon dilatation catheter with 40mm balloon length for pre-dilatation procedures

MaterialMedical grade catheter materials
Frequently Asked Questions

Balloon dilatation catheter with 40mm balloon length for pre-dilatation procedures

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences Pvt. Ltd. and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Mammoth Balloon Dilatation Catheter, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Mammoth Balloon Dilatation Catheter is constructed using Medical grade catheter materials, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
